execution_queue_item.primary_operator_action: Execute one approved live non-GitHub Action with an explicit human approval record.
execution_queue_item.required_proof_package: Approval record, redacted request/result, provider receipt, state delta, idempotency record, audit refs, and GitHub exclusion proof.
execution_queue_item.stop_or_reject_when: Approval is ambiguous, provider receipt is missing, idempotency cannot be demonstrated, or the action uses GitHub instead of the selected non-GitHub provider.

format_rules.review_timestamp: ISO-8601 timestamp with timezone, for example 2026-06-24T12:00:00Z

redaction_guidance.operator_warning: Do not paste raw secrets, provider payloads, local file paths, private user data, or unredacted external transcripts into the reviewer record. Use redacted refs or public-safe summaries; validate-record will fail on detected sensitive markers.

senior_review_perspective_findings.accepted_value_shape: redacted finding summary per required senior-review perspective

sensitive_marker_policy.operator_action: Replace any matching material with a redacted evidence reference or public-safe summary before submitting the reviewer record.

proposed_record_template.template_rule: This blank template is operator-preparation data only. It is intentionally not structurally valid until a human reviewer fills every required field with redacted external evidence references, each senior review perspective finding, and every evidence packet manifest entry.

rehearsal_checklist: Choose a separately approved non-GitHub provider and reversible test target.
Record the rollback or compensation plan before execution.
Capture human approval for the declared Action and exact target.
Execute once and collect redacted request/result plus provider receipt/state evidence.
Verify idempotency and re-ingested outcome evidence.
Record ACCEPT or REJECT with issues, exceptions, and release impact.
connector_human_gate_package.release_impact: Blocks live Action readiness. GitHub remains excluded from this human mutation gate.

lifecycle_steps.action: Review each senior-review perspective and collect missing external evidence before judging the gate.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: Filled senior_review_perspective_findings for every required role.

lifecycle_steps.action: Execute one approved live non-GitHub Action with an explicit human approval record.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: Approval record, redacted request/result, provider receipt, state delta, idempotency record, audit refs, and GitHub exclusion proof.

lifecycle_steps.action: Run the minimum external rehearsal needed to satisfy this scenario's required human record.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: Every required field and evidence-packet manifest row is filled with redacted refs.

lifecycle_steps.action: Record issues, exceptions, or remediation needs instead of accepting a partial rehearsal.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: issues_or_exceptions plus reject/blocker notes when any stop condition appears.
Structural validation envelope remains HUMAN_REQUIRED and redacted.

lifecycle_steps.action: Store the completed reviewer record, validation envelope, and updated scenario result trail.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: Dated ACCEPT or REJECT reviewer record plus validation ref.

lifecycle_steps.action: Use the next selector to advance only after dependency unlock evidence exists.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: Structurally valid ACCEPT validation refs for all dependency gates.

required_evidence: Non-GitHub provider and reversible target approval.
Redacted request/result and provider receipt/state evidence.
Idempotency and audit refs proving exactly-once execution.

senior_review_perspective_sequence.decision: Confirm a governed live Action creates useful outcome evidence without normalizing autonomous external mutation.
Keep execution behind declared actions, policy, approval, idempotency, and ConnectorHub-mediated provider access.
Require ActionCard, policy decision, approval, result receipt, outcome evidence, idempotency, and audit refs.
Require provider receipt/state evidence and a rollback or compensation plan for the reversible target.
Reject if GitHub is used, approval is missing, the provider target is not reversible, or credentials leak.
Compare live execution semantics against CS-CH-029 through CS-CH-033 fixture contracts.

scenario_delivery_unit_plan.stop_or_reject_when: Approval is ambiguous, provider receipt is missing, idempotency cannot be demonstrated, or the action uses GitHub instead of the selected non-GitHub provider.
